title: Exercise Steadfast Dart
description: NATO will conduct Exercise Steadfast Dart 25 to practice the deployment of the new Allied Reaction Force, which can rapidly reinforce NATO’s eastern flank. These important exercises will showcase the Alliance’s readiness, capability, and commitment to defend every inch of NATO territory.
text:
Baltics
Operation Cabrit
Established in 2016, Operation Cabrit is the UK’s contribution to NATO’s Forward Land Forces in Estonia and Poland.
Romania
Exercise Steadfast Dart
In January and February 2025, 1st (UK) Division rehearsed the deployment of the new Allied Reaction Force, rapidly reinforcing NATO's Eastern flank.
Germany
Germany
Germany is home to the British Army-led NATO Forward Holding Base in Sennelager. This base hosts British Army tanks, equipment, and logistics elements as well as providing a facility to integrate and train with NATO allies to practise pour shared commitment to the alliance’s collective security and defence.
Gibraltar
Gibraltar
Gibraltar is a strategically important territory on the gateway of the Mediterranean Sea and Atlantic Ocean which is garrisoned by British Force Gibraltar.
